children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type, read from CSV/JSON/API, parse into records, write to raw_data, and append log entry to pipeline_log

semantic_inputs.name: source
semantic_inputs.description: Source configuration with type and path_or_url

semantic_outputs.name: ingest_result
semantic_outputs.description: Dict with success, records_processed, errors, and raw_data reference

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, skip malformed records, store in processed_data, and log transformation
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule to each record, skip records that cause errors, write valid transformed records to processed_data, append log entry
guarantees: malformed records are skipped and logged

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, compute quality_score, and log validation
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, assign quality_score, mark invalid records (e.g., set a 'valid' flag), append log entry

semantic_outputs.name: validate_result
semantic_outputs.description: Dict with success, records_processed, errors, and updated processed_data with quality info

postconditions: processed_data records have quality_score and valid flag
guarantees: invalid records are marked but not removed

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output in requested format, log export, and return final result
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter to only records that passed validation, format as CSV or JSON, append log entry, return pipeline_result with data

semantic_outputs.name: pipeline_result
semantic_outputs.description: Final result with success, records_processed, errors, data

preconditions: processed_data is populated with validation results

decomposition_rationale: The DataPipeline function block is decomposed into four sequential child functions corresponding to the four ETL actions: IngestData, TransformData, ValidateData, and ExportData. Each child handles one distinct phase of the pipeline, operates on shared data stores (raw_data, processed_data, pipeline_log), and logs its own step. The parent orchestrates by calling the appropriate child based on the action field, but since the pipeline is sequential, all children are invoked in order for a full run.
